title: The Girl Said No
writer: Betty Laidlaw, Robert Lively, Andrew L. Stone
actors: Robert Armstrong, Irene Hervey, Paula Stone
plot: Jimmy, a bookie cum horse buying agent, meets a beautiful dance hall girl. After leading him on, and out of his money, she rejects him. Jimmy hatches a scheme to wreak revenge on her. He pretends to be a talent agent and that she ...
